{{CargoRelic
|name=Peace of Westphalia
|class_id=22511
|rank=AA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=06-14
|source=
|description=On Jun 14, 1648 AD, the Peace of Westphalia was signed, and the Thirty Years' War officially ended.<br>Due to sectarian conflicts and political conflicts between countries, a war broke out on the European continent, with Germany as the main battlefield. With the signing of the Peace of Westphalia, the thirty-year war came to an end. The result not only had a significant impact on the patterns of various countries in Europe but also led to reconciliation between Catholics and Protestants, marking the end of the religious reform movement on the European continent.
|fame=70
|art=37
|fth=34
|civ=39
|tech=48
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
